metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Copperhaven.

towns.name: Copperhaven
towns.description: A crossroads town where adventurers gather to share rumours and ale.

key_dungeons.name: Sunken Tunnels
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Sunken Tunnels. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.
